reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service...it takes a little while to process the payment through the app, as the connection isn't very good...but the customer service is wonderful, keep it up! 👍

reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicio en los Altares, que es de la red del Automóvil Club Argentino, al igual que la deesa red en Tortugas, Santa Fe, son más famosas por los sandwich de jamón crudo que por sus cualidades, si tienen la oportunidad de compararlos no se arrepentiran. Ésta, cuenta con motel y comedor, buenos servicios e inmejorable atención.

(Translated by Google)
This gas station in Los Altares, part of the Automóvil Club Argentino network, like the one in Tortugas, Santa Fe, is more famous for its prosciutto sandwiches than for its other qualities. If you have the chance to compare them, you won't regret it. This station also has a motel and restaurant, good service, and excellent customer care.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHemFlMUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Un oasis en el medio de la inmensidad patagónica, cuenta con todos los servicios necesarios para el viajante. Acepta pago electrónico a través de billeteras virtuales,un punto a destacar

(Translated by Google)
An oasis in the heart of Patagonia's vastness, it offers all the necessary services for travelers. Accepting electronic payments through digital wallets is a noteworthy feature.

reviews.comment:
Parada obligada en Los Altares: sanguchitos de queso y crudo con manteca. Deberé entrenar toda la semana pero qué ricos sanguches.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop in Los Altares: cheese and prosciutto sandwiches with butter. I'll have to train all week, but those sandwiches were delicious!
